channel.title: Lanka Market Pulse
channel.description: Sri Lanka's premier financial news platform

item.title: Bangladesh Authorities’ Request for a New IMF-supported Program
item.description: Ivo Krznar, International Monetary Fund (IMF) Mission Chief for Bangladesh issued the following statement: “The Bangladeshi authorities have requested a new IMF financial arrangement to support their economic reform prog
item.author: Lanka Market Pulse

item.title: Commercial Bank extends its operations to Port City Colombo
item.description: Reinforcing its commitment to support the nation’s next phase of economic transformation, Commercial Bank of Ceylon PLC’s new branch in Port City Colombo will bring world-class banking services to Sri Lanka’s emerging in
item.author: Lanka Market Pulse

item.title: Contain private credit growth to save the Rupee
item.description: The Central Bank of Sri Lanka (CBSL) suddenly increased interest rates a few days ago. This was to stop further depreciation of the rupee or to stabilise the exchange value of the rupee by containing private credit growt
item.author: Lanka Market Pulse

item.author: Lanka Market Pulse
